title: SPARK - Performance Modpack
description: A performance-oriented and general use modpack for PvP
body:
![spark performance modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24aaa5c7375a7e467b8dd1850e4fd46bb8effb91.png)


![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/530475677745676298?color=blue&label=Discord&logo=Discord&style=for-the-badge)

_This is NOT [spark](https://modrinth.com/mod/spark) the profiler. They do a great job check them out!_



## ⚡- Description


SPARK is a performance-focused modpack designed to take the multiplayer and PvP experience to the next level, regardless of your system configuration.

This modpack is monetized through the [**Modrinth Rewards Program**](https://modrinth.com/legal/cmp-info). The mods included in SPARK are covered by licenses that explicitly permit commercial use or follows Modrinth ToS. The mods (overrides) recommended below are subject to stricter licensing terms, and I strongly recommend that you use them with this modpack.

**I am NOT responsible for any sanctions you may face on multiplayer servers. Installing these mods is GENERALLY NOT CONSIDERED a bannable offense by most servers.**



## 🎯- Versions supported


**Forge 1.8.9** [Recommended with : [**Optifine 1.8.9 HD U M5**](https://optifine.net/downloads)]

**Forge 1.9.4** [Recommended with : [**Optifine 1.9.4 HD U I5**](https://optifine.net/downloads)]

**Forge 1.10.2** [Recommended with : [**Optifine 1.10.2 HD U I5**](https://optifine.net/downloads)]

**Forge 1.11.2** [Recommended with : [**Optifine 1.11.2 HD U G5**](https://optifine.net/downloads)]

**Forge 1.12.2** [Recommended with : nothing more]

**Forge 1.13.2** [Recommended with : nothing more]

**Fabric 1.14.4** [Recommended with : nothing more]

**Fabric 1.15.2** [Recommended with : nothing more]

**Fabric 1.16.5** [Iris is deactivated by default, you can enable it in "Content" in Modrinth launcher, or remove the ".disabled" at the end of the jar file in \mods]

**Fabric 1.17.1** [Recommended with : nothing more]

**Fabric 1.18.2** [Iris is deactivated by default, you can enable it in "Content" in Modrinth launcher, or remove the ".disabled" at the end of the jar file in \mods]

**Fabric 1.19.4** [Iris is deactivated by default, you can enable it in "Content" in Modrinth launcher, or remove the ".disabled" at the end of the jar file in \mods]

**Fabric 1.20.6** [Iris is deactivated by default, you can enable it in "Content" in Modrinth launcher, or remove the ".disabled" at the end of the jar file in \mods]

**Fabric 1.21.11** [Iris (Shaders) and Mercurizer (Optimizations for low-end PC) are deactivated by default, you can enable them in "Content" in Modrinth launcher, or remove the ".disabled" at the end of the jar file in \mods]

**Fabric 26.1.2** [Iris (Shaders) and Mercurizer (Optimizations for low-end PC) are deactivated by default, you can enable them in "Content" in Modrinth launcher, or remove the ".disabled" at the end of the jar file in \mods]


## 📝- Feedback


We welcome all your comments!

If you would like to share your positive feedback as well as any criticism, please fill out [**this simple form**](https://forms.gle/TttLkJdc6jSJBAa6A)



## 📊- Benchmarks

### 1.8.9

||Forge 1.8.9 w/o Optifine|Forge 1.8.9 + Optifine|Optimized FPS + Optifine|BetterPvP + Optifine|Rapid Optimization + Optifine|SPARK + Optifine|
|-|:-:|:-:|:-:|:-:|:-:|:-:|
|Test1|300-320 FPS|380-390 FPS|365-380 FPS|435-445 FPS|380-400 FPS|650-680 FPS|
|Test2|160-180 FPS|165-180 FPS|145-150 FPS|185-200 FPS|150-160 FPS|320-340 FPS|

### 1.9.4

|-|:-:|:-:|:-:|:-:|:-:|
|Test1|340-350 FPS|385-395 FPS|395-405 FPS|420-435 FPS|415-435 FPS|

### 26.1.2

||Fabric 26.1.2|Fabulously Optimized|Sodium Plus|Optifabric|SPARK|
|-|:-:|:-:|:-:|:-:|:-:|
|Test1|425-450 FPS|670-690 FPS|555-580 FPS|670-710 FPS|990-1020 FPS|
|Test2|235-260 FPS|280-325 FPS|230-260 FPS|220-280 FPS|400-440 FPS|


**Setup used :**
- CPU : AMD Ryzen 9 7900X3D ;
- GPU : nVidia RTX 4070 Ti SUPER ;
- RAM : 64 GB DDR5 @ 6000 MHz ;
- New instance with 4 GB allocated, render distance of 16 chunks, shadow distance of 16 chunks, simulation distance of 16 chunks, unlimited FPS, Normal size GUI, no sound and VBOs enabled ;
- Test1 : Overcast Community's (oc.tc) lobby, looking straight ahead from the spawn point, with no players in sight ;
- Test2 : Hypixel's Bedwars lobby, facing forward, behind the spawn point (right in front of the portal), with the players on (~ 60 people).
